name: Harbin ZhongFei New Technology CO.,LTD.
summary: Harbin ZhongFei New Technology CO.,LTD., together with its subsidiary, provides aluminum products in China. The company offers aluminum alloy forgings, extrusions, and machine parts. It is also involved in the production and sale of mechanical equipment and instrumentation; mechanical processing activities, as well as offers technical services. In addition, the company offers extrusion bars, pipes, small diameter bars, profiles, shaped tubes, and ingots; and heat treatment furnaces, vacuum brazing furnaces, and tension stretching machines. Its aluminum products are used in nuclear energy, aviation, military, electronic, machinery, and equipment manufacturing industries. The company was formerly known as Harbin ZhongFei New Technology Ltd. and changed its name to Harbin ZhongFei New Technology CO.,LTD. in November 2010. Harbin ZhongFei New Technology CO.,LTD. was founded in 2006 and is based in Harbin, China.
